ops.text: Phase 1 implementation LANDED on pack-redesign (afccea09 feat! + 0adc8e86 docs; 89 files +949/−4623; uv run pytest 3689 passed/4 skipped; ruff clean). Key decisions from the lane: [tools] matching = BARE tool-name suffixes (cc-transcript's matches_names strips mcp__<server>__ mount-agnostically; exact MCP names would break cross-mount — pinned by test); only general+steering carry a pack.toml (the nlp resources); auto-detect = single pruned os.walk (VCS+gitignored dirs pruned, short-circuits per language), a stable daemon-fingerprint input. Deviations adjudicated: #2 (capt-hook test scopes to .claude/hooks only) and #3 (daemon tests seed spaCy into isolated XDG cache) ACCEPTED. #1 (roster dedupe replacing dup-id crash) accepted in principle but REFINED: live roster shows all dupes are scope layering (project+user; cc-orchestrate has different installPaths per scope), and the lane's dict-comprehension dedupe was last-entry-wins/order-dependent — refinement dispatched: identical (id,installPath) collapse; different paths resolve by scope precedence local>project>user (mirrors Claude's own resolution, so the pack loads from the install Claude actually runs); same id+scope+different paths = PluginListError; all three pinned by tests. Follow-ups tracked: stale docs (installation/project-structure/troubleshooting qmd) get the fable prose pass pre-tag; CHANGELOG [Unreleased] reconcile at release; captain-hook's own inert .claude/capt-hook.toml dies in the Phase 3 sweep. Next: refinement lands → finder/refuter review workflow over the full diff.
